100: 〉 When you exit the room, you find 
Stephen waiting for you as if all
of this is perfectly normal.
[END]
101: (Stephen) [7a 14]Hello. I'm glad to see you accepted 
my quest.
[->]Sorry for being so terse, we're short 
on time. Allow me to explain things.
[->]As I wrote in my request, repercussions 
from YHVH's defeat are manifesting in
other universes...
[->]These repercussions have particularly
effected the other four who came here,
and now threatens their very existence.
[END]
102: 〉 Stephen produces a soul and shows
it to you.
[END]
103: (Stephen) [7a 14]This is one of those four.
[->]He has lost his reason to exist,
and has since been reduced to a soul.
[->]It's not necessarily your fault, but...
Well, you did indirectly cause it.
[->]The other four are, like you, messiahs
in their own worlds.
[->]If you agree to help them, I will
lend you my power.
[END]
104: 〉 Help the messiahs from 
other universes?
[END]
105: Help them
Don't help them
Think about it later
[END]
106: (Stephen) [7a 14]I thought you might say that.
[->]If you wish to help them, I will
lend you my power.
[->]First, go greet them.
[->]I'm counting on you.
[END]
107: (Stephen) [7a 14]I see. That's too bad...
[->]Talk to Zenki to return to your world. 
He is in that room over there.
[->]But if you change your mind...
[->]Go meet the three of them.
[->]I hope you change their mind and 
decide to save them.
[END]
108: (Stephen) [7a 14]I see. Take your time...
[->]If you wish to return to your world, 
talk to Zenki. He is in that room 
over there.
[->]But, if you decide to save them...
[->]Go meet the three of them.
[->]I look forward to your decision.
[END]
